customer_need: Customer asks if an item can be returned after the window.
rationale: Policy questions can be answered only if the assistant can ground the answer in policy text. When policy is ambiguous, route to support.
response_pattern: Acknowledge, explain policy limits, and offer support options.

customer_need: Customer wants alternatives for an out-of-stock grocery item.
rationale: The assistant can recommend similar items if it has product attributes and substitution rules.
response_pattern: Suggest a few substitutes and ask for dietary constraints.

customer_need: Customer asks for a competitor price match.
rationale: Pricing policies often have exceptions and need strict grounding.
response_pattern: Explain that a human or official policy review is needed.

customer_need: Customer cannot tell whether an order shipped or was canceled.
rationale: The assistant can summarize order status when data is clear and recent.
response_pattern: Provide current status and next steps.

customer_need: Customer requests purchase guidance for a restricted category.
rationale: The assistant must not provide unsupported or restricted recommendations.
response_pattern: Decline the unsafe path and redirect to approved support.

customer_need: Customer wants help choosing between two appliances.
rationale: The assistant can compare clear attributes and use-case fit.
response_pattern: Compare known attributes and ask about constraints.
